title: Usable Fletching Table
description: This is a mod that does the thing mojang still won't; it adds usable Flecthing Tables.
body:
This is a mod that does the thing mojang still won't; it adds usable Flecthing Tables.

 

It adds a user friendly GUI to Fletching Tables.

 

It also adds extra arrows such as:

Iron Arrows: Increased damage, piercing, and increased inacuracy

Golden Arrows: Increased damage and decreased velocity

Quartz Arrow: Increased damage and velocity

Blazing Arrow: Increased damage and sets opponent on fire for fifteen seconds or 300 ticks

Honey Tipped Arrow: Slows Down opponents and disables jumping for players

Ender Arrow: Allows Players to Teleport 

 

Also adds "Strider Feather" which can be droped by striders. with a 50% chance of dropping 1-4 Feathers

 

The Mod adds Quivers as well.
